hero_description: Passionate about creating exceptional web experiences with modern technologies. I build scalable, user-friendly applications that make a difference.
projects_subtitle: Here are some of my recent projects that showcase my skills and passion for development
about_description_1: Hi! I'm Praveen Sunhare, a passionate MERN/MEAN stack developer who enjoys building modern, scalable, and user-friendly web applications. I love transforming ideas into functional digital experiences using cutting-edge technologies.
about_description_2: My journey in web development started with curiosity about how websites work. Over time, it evolved into a professional career where I solve complex problems and build efficient applications using clean, maintainable code.
about_description_3: Outside of coding, I enjoy exploring new technologies, contributing to open-source projects, and sharing knowledge with the developer community. I'm always excited to collaborate on innovative projects that create real impact.
technologies_subtitle: Here are some of the technologies I use...
contact_subtitle: I'm always interested in new opportunities and collaborations. Let's discuss how we can work together!
contact_description: Whether you have a project in mind, want to discuss opportunities, or just want to say hello, I'd love to hear from you. Drop me an email and I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
